data[0] = 32'b00000000000000000000_00001_0010111; // auipc x1, 0
data[1] = 32'b000000010000_00001_000_00001_0010011; // addi  x1, x1, 16
data[2] = 32'b000000000000_00001_000_00010_1100111; // jalr  x2, 0(x1)
data[3] = 32'b000000000001_00000_000_00011_0010011; // addi  x3, x0, 1   (skipped)
data[4] = 32'b000000000010_00000_000_00100_0010011; // target: addi x4, x0, 2
data[5] = 32'b0100000_00010_00001_000_00101_0110011; // sub x5, x1, x2
data[6] = 32'b0000100_00100_00000_010_00000_0100011; // sw x4, 128(x0)
data[7] = 32'b0000100_00101_00000_010_00100_0100011; // sw x5, 132(x0)
